header_0.raw_response: In this situation, I would place the marker at 60. While I value open communication and addressing issues directly, I also understand the importance of maintaining a positive work environment. In this case, I would first approach the coworker privately and calmly explain the situation, giving them the benefit of the doubt. However, if the behavior continues, I would not hesitate to escalate the issue to my manager or HR to ensure my ideas are properly credited and my contributions are valued.
